name: tty-pet
description: A playful terminal pet that reacts to your project state.

interface.shortDescription: Let Codex report project progress to tty-pet.
interface.longDescription: tty-pet exposes a local MCP server so Codex can read the current project companion state and record safe workflow events such as pass, fail, poke, treat, call, and nap.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use tty-pet to check the current companion state and record project workflow events when appropriate.
